name: six-layer-execution-system
description: Self-contained Codex plugin for inspecting, validating, and evolving focus-first six-layer execution-system repositories.

interface.shortDescription: Inspect, validate, and evolve focus-first execution-system repos
interface.longDescription: Copy this plugin directory into a Codex plugin folder to inspect the local execution-system snapshot, recover live focus state from ACTIVE.md, run the canonical checker suite, and evolve protocol, governance, or closeout flows inside a self-contained six-layer execution-system repository.
defaultPrompt: Inspect this repo, summarize the current focus activity, and explain the next slice.
Run the canonical execution-system checks and report any blocking failures.
Open ACTIVE.md, recover the live state, and outline the next concrete action.
